title: Deuterated 1,3 dihydro -2h-indole-2-one derivatives
abstract: The present invention relates to deuterated 1,3 Dihydro -2H-indole-2-one derivatives and a pharmaceutical composition comprising said deuterated compounds. It further relates to a method of manufacturing said deuterated compounds and the use of said compounds as a medicament. The present invention also relates to intermediates suitable for the preparation of the compounds of the invention.
claims:
Claims Claims 1. A compound of formula (I): or a pharmaceutically acceptable salt or prodrug thereof, wherein: R 1 , R 2 , R 3, R 19 , R 20 , and R 21 are individually selected from the group consisting of hydrogen, C 1-4 alkyl, and C 1-4 alkoxy, R 5 , R 6 , R 7 , R 8 , R 9 , R 10 , R 11 , R 12 , R 13, R 14 , R 15 , R 16 , R 17 , and R 18 are individually selected from the group consisting of hydrogen, halogen, C 1-4 alkyl, C 1-4 haloalkyl, C 1-4 alkoxy, and C 1-4 haloalkoxy, R 4 is selected from the group consisting of C 1-4 alkylamino, C 1-4 haloalkylamino, di-C 1-4 alkylamino, di-C 1-4 haloalkylamino, and azetidin-1-yl, R 22 is selected from the group consisting of hydrogen, C 1-4 alkyl, C 1-4 haloalkyl, -(CH 2 ) n - CO-R38, and -CO-(CH2)n-NR39R40, R 38 is selected from the group consisting of hydrogen, hydroxy and C 1-4 alkyl, R 39 and R 40 are individually selected from the group consisting of hydrogen, C 1-4 alkyl, and C 1-4 haloalkyl, or R 39 and R 40 , together with the nitrogen atom to which they are attached, constitute a heterocyclic group selected from the group consisting of: azetidin-1-yl, pyrrolidin-1-yl, piperid-1-yl, piperazin-1-yl, morpholin-4-yl and thiomorpholin-4-yl; and integer n is 1 or 2, wherein a) at least one hydrogen of R 4 , which is selected from C 1-4 alkylamino or di-C 1-4 alkylamino, is enriched in deuterium, and/or 

 b) at least one hydrogen of R 5 , R 7 , or R 14 , which are individually selected from C 1-4 alkyl or C 1-4 alkoxy, is enriched in deuterium, and c) optionally at least one hydrogen of R 1 , R 2 , R 3, R 6 , R 8 , R 9 , R 10 , R 11 , R 13, R 15 , R 16 , R 17 , R 18, R 19 , R 20 , or R 21 is enriched in deuterium. 2. The compound according to claim 1, wherein a) at least one hydrogen of R 1 , R 2 , R 3, R 6 , R 8 , R 9 , R 10 , R 11 , R 13, R 15 , R 16 , R 17 , R 18, R 19 , R20, or R21 is enriched in deuterium, b) at least one hydrogen of R 4 , which is dimethylamino, is enriched in deuterium, and/or c) at least one hydrogen of R 5 , R 7 , or R 14 , which are methoxy, is enriched in deuterium. 3. The compound according to claim 1 or 2, wherein d) R 5 , R 7, and R 14 are a methoxy group, e) R 12 is a methyl, trifluoromethyl or halogen atom, preferably a chlorine atom, f) R 22 is hydrogen, and /or g) R 1 , R 2, R 3 , R 6 , R 8 , R 9 , R 10 , R 11 , R 13, R 15 , R 16 , R 17 , R 18, R 19 , R 20 , and R 21 are hydrogen. 4. The compound of formula (I) according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein all six hydrogens, of R 4 , which is dimethylamino, and/or all three hydrogens, of R 5 , R 7 , or R 14 , which are a methoxy group, is enriched in deuterium. 5. The compound according to any one of the preceding claims, which is a compound of formula (II): wherein R 1 , R 2 , R 3, R 4 , R 5 , R 6 , R 7 , R 8 , R 9 , R 10 , R 11 , R 12 , R 13, R 14 , R 15 , R 16 , R 17 , R 18, R 19 , R 20 , R 21 , and R 22 are as defined in claim 1. 6. The compound according to any one of the preceding claims, which is a compound of formula (III) or (IV): wherein R 1 , R 2 , R 3, R 6 , R 8 , R 9 , R 10 , R 11 , R 12, R 13 , R 15 , R 16 , R 17 , R 18, R 19 , R 20 , R 21 and R 22 are as defined in claim 1, and R 23 , R 24 , R 25 , R 26, R 27 , R 28 , R 29 , R 30 , R 31 , R 32 , R 33 , R 34 , R 35 , R 36 and R 37 are hydrogen. 7. The compound according to claim 6, which is a compound of formula (V): wherein R 22 is as defined in claim 6, preferably hydrogen, and R 12 is as defined in claim 6, preferably chlorine. 8. The compound according to claim 7, wherein a) R 23 , R 24 , R 25 , R 26, R 27 , and R 28 are enriched in deuterium, b) R 29 , R 30 , R 31 , R 32 , R 33 , and R 34 are enriched in deuterium, and/or c) R 35 , R 36 and R 37 are enriched in deuterium. 9. The compound according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the enrichment in deuterium is at least 10%, at least 30%, at least 50%, at least 70%, at least 97%, at least 98%, or at least 99%. 10. A process for the preparation of a compound of formula (I): or a pharmaceutically acceptable salt or prodrug thereof, wherein: R 1 , R 2 , R 3, R 19 , R 20 , and R 21 are individually selected from the group consisting of hydrogen, C 1-4 alkyl, and C 1-4 alkoxy, R 5 , R 6 , R 7 , R 8 , R 9 , R 10 , R 11 , R 12 , R 13, R 14 , R 15 , R 16 , R 17 , and R 18 are individually selected from the group consisting of hydrogen, halogen, C 1-4 alkyl, C 1-4 haloalkyl, C 1-4 alkoxy, and C 1-4 haloalkoxy, R 4 is selected from the group consisting of C 1-4 alkylamino, C 1-4 haloalkylamino, di-C 1-4 alkylamino, di-C 1-4 haloalkylamino, and azetidin-1-yl, R 22 is selected from the group consisting of hydrogen, C 1-4 alkyl, C 1-4 haloalkyl, -(CH 2 ) n - CO-R 38, and -CO-(CH 2 ) n -NR 39 R 40 , R 38 is selected from the group consisting of hydrogen, hydroxy and C 1-4 alkyl, R 39 and R 40 are individually selected from the group consisting of hydrogen, C 1-4 alkyl, and C 1-4 haloalkyl, or R 39 and R 40 , together with the nitrogen atom to which they are attached, constitute a heterocyclic group selected from the group consisting of: azetidin-1-yl, pyrrolidin-1-yl, piperid-1-yl, piperazin-1-yl, morpholin-4-yl and thiomorpholin-4-yl; and integer n is 1 or 2, wherein a) at least one hydrogen of R 4 , which is selected from C 1-4 alkylamino or di-C 1-4 alkylamino, is enriched in deuterium, and/or b) at least one hydrogen of R 5 , R 7 , or R 14 , which are individually selected from C 1-4 alkyl or C 1-4 alkoxy, is enriched in deuterium, and c) optionally at least one hydrogen of R 1 , R 2 , R 3, R 6 , R 8 , R 9 , R 10 , R 11 , R 13, R 15 , R 16 , R 17 , R 18, R 19 , R 20 , or R 21 is enriched in deuterium, 

 the process comprising a step of reacting at least one of the following compounds of formulae (VI), (VII), (VIII), or (IX) wherein R 1 , R 2 , R 3, R 4 , R 5 , R 6 , R 7 , R 8 , R 9 , R 10 , R 11 , R 12 , R 13 , R 14 , R 15 , R 16 , R 17 , R 18, R 19 , R 20 , and R 21 are as defined for formula (I), R 41 is a halogen or an activating ester residue, R 42 is a halogen, and R 43 is R 22 or a hydroxyl protecting group. 11. The process according to claim 10, wherein a) in the compound of formula (VI) at least one hydrogen of R 4 , which is selected from C 1-4 alkylamino or di-C 1-4 alkylamino, preferably dimethylamino, is enriched in deuterium, and preferably R 1 , R 2 , R 3, R 19 , R 20 and R 21 are hydrogen and R 43 is hydrogen or a hydroxyl protecting group, b) in the compound of formula (VII) at least one hydrogen of R 5 , or R 7 , which are individually selected from C 1-4 alkyl or C 1-4 alkoxy, preferably methoxy, is enriched in deuterium, and preferably R 6 , R 8 , and R 9 are hydrogen, and/or c) in the compound of formula (VIII) at least one, preferably at least two or at least three, hydrogen of R14, which is selected from C1-4 alkyl or C1-4 alkoxy, preferably methoxy, is enriched in deuterium, and preferably R 15 , R 16 , R 17 , and R 18 are hydrogen. 12. A pharmaceutical composition comprising a compound according to formula (I) according to any one of claims 1 to 9 and a pharmaceutical acceptable carrier. 13. A compound according to any of claims 1 to 9 or the pharmaceutical composition according to claim 12 for use as medicament. 14. A compound according to any of claims 1 to 9 or the pharmaceutical composition according to claim 12 for use in the treatment or prophylaxis of disorders of the central nervous system, in particular of anxiety or depression. 15. A compound according to formula (X): wherein R 12 is selected from the group consisting of hydrogen, halogen, C 1-4 alkyl, C 1-4 haloalkyl, C 1-4 alkoxy, and C 1-4 haloalkoxy, preferably a methyl, trifluoromethyl or halogen, more preferably chlorine, R 22 is selected from the group consisting of hydrogen, C 1-4 alkyl, C 1-4 haloalkyl, -(CH 2 ) n - CO-R 38, and -CO-(CH 2 ) n -NR 39 R 40 , R 38 is selected from the group consisting of hydrogen, hydroxy and C 1-4 alkyl, R 39 and R 40 are individually selected from the group consisting of hydrogen, C 1-4 alkyl, and C 1-4 haloalkyl, or R 39 and R 40 , together with the nitrogen atom to which they are attached, constitute a heterocyclic group selected from the group consisting of: azetidin-1-yl, pyrrolidin-1-yl, piperid-1-yl, piperazin-1-yl, morpholin-4-yl and thiomorpholin-4-yl; and integer n is 1 or 2; or R 22 is a hydroxyl protecting group, and R 23 , R 24 , R 25 , R 26, R 27 , R 28 , R 35 , R 36 and R 37 are hydrogen, provided that at least one, preferably at least two or at least three, of R 23 , R 24 , R 25 , R 26, R 27 , R 28 , R 35 , R 36 and R 37 is enriched in deuterium.
